name: Ticket

labels: ["ticket"]

## Summary
<!-- One or two sentences: what this ticket delivers and why. -->

## Context / Background
<!-- Links to the parent epic, related tickets, designs, or decisions. -->

- Epic: #
- Depends on: #

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- The single most important section. Each item is independently verifiable. -->
<!-- A ticket is DONE only when every box below is ticked. -->

- [ ]

## Implementation Notes
<!-- Optional: files to touch, suggested approach, gotchas. -->

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Acceptance criteria above all met
- [ ] Code reviewed and merged to `main`
- [ ] No new linter / type warnings introduced
- [ ] Manually verified locally
